subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the understanding and perception of all created things, beseemeth the most exalted and sacred court of Him Who is the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عرفان و ادراک کائنات بساط امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @apocalyptic imagery, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @praise and encouragement
